note: Trigger-style prompts for description tuning. The full workflow opens real PRs, so these test triggering and resolution intent only; do NOT run them end to end against a live repo. Ids are shown in both tracker styles (fra-NNN and #NNN) on purpose: the orchestrator is tracker-agnostic and resolves them via config.source.

evals.prompt: ship all the todo issues and open a PR for each
evals.expected_output: Triggers; resolves every Todo work-unit from config.source and plans lanes.

evals.prompt: knock out fra-111 through fra-120, no need to check with me first
evals.expected_output: Triggers; expands the range and runs without the plan checkpoint (skip-confirmation token).

evals.prompt: do #131 and #134, open PRs for each
evals.expected_output: Triggers; resolves exactly those two work-units, groups them, ships each to a PR.
Triggers; treats bare numbers as ids via idPrefix; the skip-docs token turns off the doc phase.

evals.prompt: open a PR for my current branch
evals.expected_output: Does NOT trigger ship-issues; routes to open-pr (one finished branch, not a batch).
